import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; const Home = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [currentSlide, setCurrentSlide] = useState(0); const slides = [ { title: "Advanced Medical Equipment", description: "State-of-the-art diagnostic machines for accurate results", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1538108149393-fbbd81895907?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&q=80", gradient: "from-blue-600 to-blue-800" }, { title: "Expert Medical Team", description: "Experienced doctors and healthcare professionals", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1631217868264-e5b90bb7e133?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&q=80", gradient: "from-green-600 to-green-800" }, { title: "Modern Laboratory", description: "Comprehensive lab testing with quick turnaround", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579154204601-01588f351e67?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&q=80", gradient: "from-purple-600 to-purple-800" }, { title: "24/7 Emergency Care", description: "Round-the-clock emergency medical services", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519494026892-80bbd2d6fd0d?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&q=80", gradient: "from-red-600 to-red-800" }, { title: "Digital Health Records", description: "Secure and accessible patient management system", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1576091160550-2173dba999ef?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&q=80", gradient: "from-indigo-600 to-indigo-800" } ]; useEffect(() => { const timer = setInterval(() => { setCurrentSlide((prev) => (prev + 1) % slides.length); }, 4000); return () => clearInterval(timer); }, [slides.length]); const goToSlide = (index) => { setCurrentSlide(index); }; return (

{/* What is Hospital Management System Section */}

What is Hospital Management System?

Hospital Management System is a software designed to manage all aspects of the operation of a hospital, nursing home, or clinic, such as the clinical, administrative and financial part of the institution. It is also known as Hospital Information System (HIS), Hospital Administrative System, Hospital Management Information System or Hospital Management Software.

Our system revolutionizes patient care through innovative technology designed specifically for Agmas Medium Clinic, providing seamless integration of all healthcare operations.

10,000+

Patients Served

{/* Benefits Section */}

Benefits of Hospital Management System

Why choose our comprehensive healthcare solution

⚡

Quick Access to Patient Records

Simplified data management with digital records. Access patient history with a simple click. No more heavy documents and bulky files.

🎯

Effective Diagnosis

Reduced burden of paperwork with more effective diagnosis. Quick access to accurate data reduces medical errors and offers better patient care.

🏥

Convenience of Medical Care

Improved quality of medical care with better support for decision making. Clinical alerts, reminders, and elimination of redundant forms.

🔒

Privacy and Security

Patient registration is safer and more systematic. Secure IT system keeps health data safe and protected with advanced encryption.

💰

Cost-Efficient

Almost eliminates paper use in data management. Saves cost and workforce involved in record keeping. No need to duplicate evidence.

⏱️

Time Saving

Saves time in treating patients. Allows doctors to communicate online. Patients get prescriptions directly without multiple clinic visits.

{/* Features Section */}

Our Core Features

Comprehensive healthcare management solutions

📋

Medical Records

Access your medical history, prescriptions, and lab results anytime, anywhere.

💊

E-Prescription

Digital prescriptions sent directly to pharmacy for quick and accurate dispensing.

🔬

Lab Integration

Seamless laboratory test ordering and results viewing in one platform.

💳

Payment System

Multiple payment options including card, mobile money, and cash with digital receipts.

🩺

Triage System

Priority-based patient assessment with vital signs tracking and doctor assignment.

🔔

Notifications

Real-time alerts for appointments, test results, and prescription updates.
